member.name: M:GestãoIdeas.Controllers.IdeaEndPoints.GetAllIdeas(GestãoIdeas.Data.IdeaContext,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{GestãoIdeas.Data.IdeaContext})
member.summary: Gets all ideas from the database.

member.name: M:GestãoIdeas.Controllers.IdeaEndPoints.GetIdIdeas(System.Int32,GestãoIdeas.Data.IdeaContext,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{GestãoIdeas.Data.IdeaContext})
member.summary: Gets a single idea by its identifier.

member.name: M:GestãoIdeas.Controllers.IdeaEndPoints.GetPriority(System.Int32,GestãoIdeas.Data.IdeaContext,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{GestãoIdeas.Data.IdeaContext})
member.summary: Gets all ideas that match the specified priority.

member.name: M:GestãoIdeas.Controllers.IdeaEndPoints.DeleteIdea(System.Int32,GestãoIdeas.Data.IdeaContext,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{GestãoIdeas.Data.IdeaContext})
member.summary: Deletes an idea by its identifier.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.
